slots.caption_ig:
The ForkFox story started with a simple problem: restaurant discovery was broken. We spent eighteen months eating through Philadelphia, building a framework for understanding why restaurants work, and realized the algorithm was just a tool for seeing what was always there.

#ForkFox #FoodIntelligence #Philadelphia #FoodAlgorithm #RestaurantDiscovery
slots.caption_fb: Why did we start ForkFox? Because in 2018, the best restaurant guide was still a coin flip. Three founders spent eighteen months eating their way through Philadelphia, asking one simple question: What if we could make restaurant discovery actually work? This is how an algorithm that notices what the guide misses came to exist.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Editorial b-roll of the topic in 'Why We Started ForkFox: The Food Intelligence Story Behind the Algorithm'. Calm pace, no music vocals. End frame: article title + 'Link in bio.'
